name: Girlfriend (17 BUCKS)
description:
Girlfriend from the Friday Night Funkin' Mod: 17 Bucks.
Art by @NoodleHonk on Twitter.

Has a fairly detailed personality, and the scenario focuses on the plot/lore of the mod: It takes place within the Temu HQ, and Girlfriend wants to rap battle you. Do as you will, my ass keeps getting friend-zoned tbh.
